violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice disposed. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
ROP fish observed thawing with package still intact. PIC informed and cut opening in package. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of (dry ingredients). Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets and handles were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves have an accumulation of food residue and small accumulation of rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

The walls behind prep table have an accumulation of soil residue and grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
